violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment. Scott is at Bashful Bison. Joanna is leaving at the end of April.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Freezer or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food in a frozen state. Walk in freezer does not work.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Ansul system is not working.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. See photo of walk in cooler.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Doorways in the hallway have been cut. See attached photo.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor tiles are cracked/damaged in the kitchen.
General premises. — --Opening to outside was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Back door has a large gap under it. See attached photo.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
